goal: 固化 Browser Harness 式浏览器操作第一性原则

summary.title: 固化 Browser Harness 式浏览器调试闭环
summary.what: 把 browser automation 主线收敛到 Browser Harness 式少数强原语和可追溯证据：补齐 page.info、click_xy、type_text、scroll 等 page action 接线，保留 screenshot/press_key/tabs 路径；新增真实浏览器 dogfood runner 和 existing-Chrome external-page bridge，让产品 MV3 sidepanel/chat/kernel/tool-call 路径能在真实站点中生成任务页截图、侧栏截图、network events、observability timeline/raw tail 与 chat bootstrap 证据；把 no-progress 从自动终止条件降为诊断信号，并修复嵌套 page action 暂停外层 chat loop 的问题。
summary.why: 用户要求先把开发环境做成 debug 友好，并用真实生产式场景 dogfood 浏览器能力；旧仓复杂评分/locator/hidden recovery 方向不可取，当前仓需要少量可靠原语、LLM/Agent 可调用的工具面、以及足够完整的调试证据来让 Agent 自己判断下一步。
summary.user_goal: 固化 Browser Harness 式浏览器操作第一性原则

decisions.point: 浏览器操作的默认抽象
decisions.chose: 采用 Browser Harness 式少数强原语：page.info、screenshot、click_xy、type_text、press_key、scroll、tabs，并把 page.query/UID 语义保留为辅助或待降级对象。
decisions.rationale: 真实 dogfood 显示模型能基于可见页面摘要、截图、坐标和少量状态自己判断路径；继续堆智能 locator、评分器或隐藏 fallback 会重走旧仓复杂不可用的问题。
rejected: 把旧仓 UID ranking、自动评分、智能 locator、隐藏 verify/recovery 继续作为主线

decisions.point: 调试证据如何进入 Agent 流程
decisions.chose: 普通 tool result 使用 compact projection，完整 DOM/query/screenshot/network/trace 证据通过 observability、artifact 和 dogfood report 面显式读取。
decisions.rationale: 这些能力本质上都是给 LLM/Agent 调用的工具；差别在于默认上下文不能每步塞入全量 raw dump，深层证据必须可由 Agent 继续调用读取。
rejected: 把完整 raw DOM、截图 data URL、network dump 和 raw events 默认灌进每轮 chat context

decisions.point: 真实站点 dogfood 方式
decisions.chose: 优先用固定 profile 的真实浏览器 runner；当登录策略阻断时，用 existing-Chrome external-page bridge claim 用户已打开 tab，但产品侧仍走 MV3 sidepanel/chat/kernel/tool-call。
decisions.rationale: 这样能覆盖真实登录态、真实网络、真实 UI 输出，同时避免把人工直接浏览器操作误算为产品通过。
rejected: 只用本地假页面作为生产式 dogfood 证据
让外部手工点击替代产品 tool-call 路径

decisions.chose: no-progress/repeat-signature/ping-pong 只作为诊断信号，不再由 LoopEngine 自动终止 browser task。
decisions.rationale: 真实 MDN dogfood 暴露过 progress_uncertain 提前停止；是否继续应由当前 Agent 基于证据判断，而不是 runtime 代码替 Agent 判分。

rejected.alternative: 通过代码评分器或自动验收分判断 browser task 成败
rejected.reason: 这会把判断权重新塞回 runtime 代码，和本轮第一性原则相反。

rejected.alternative: 把 debug runner 的宽 host 权限静默写回正常产品 manifest
rejected.reason: 本轮真实 runner 使用 debug-only extension 副本承载更宽权限；正常产品权限策略后续应作为单独产品授权决策处理。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/runtime-chat.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/loop-engine.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/loop-orchestrator.spec.ts packages/kernel/test/llm-message-model.spec.ts，126 tests / 414 expects。
验证通过：bun test apps/mv3-shell/test/manifest.spec.ts，99 tests / 448 expects。
验证通过：./node_modules/.bin/biome check 目标文件集合。
验证通过：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check。
安全检查：新增 dogfood 脚本读取 Codex provider token 只用于本地 runner 调用，报告只写 provider/model/baseUrl/api；token/secret 相关字段有脱敏逻辑，未发现硬编码密钥。
Mainline preflight 的 int_4ea34682 与 int_a6221317 overlap 已检查：二者是同一 actor、同一分支、同一线程的前序 proposed intent，本次 intent 是在其基础上继续收口 Browser Harness dogfood 和调试闭环，不是外部语义冲突。
本轮 mainline append 被重复触发了一次，语义相同；seal 以本条总结为准。

architectural_claims: browser automation lane should prefer a small Browser Harness style primitive set plus explicit evidence over code-owned scoring or hidden recovery
runtime chat tool execution should route page and tabs through the shared capability provider registry and runtime services rather than private chat-only branches
debug evidence is LLM/Agent-accessible through explicit tools/resources/artifacts, while ordinary chat tool results use compact projections
no-progress detection is diagnostic evidence and should not be a terminal condition for browser tasks
behavioral_changes: page.info returns compact visible page summary including URL, title, viewport, visible text and visible interactive element boxes
page.click_xy, page.type_text and page.scroll can run through the MV3 page-hook path
runtime chat can execute page/tabs tool calls and emit observability events for LLM/tool/run lifecycle
debug-only browserActionEvidence and artifact/network/raw event fields are stripped from ordinary persisted LLM tool messages
real browser dogfood runners can collect task screenshot, sidepanel screenshot, network events, observability timeline/raw tail and chat bootstrap artifacts
nested page actions no longer pause an already running outer chat loop
LoopEngine no longer terminates on no-progress detection; callers can still inspect checkNoProgress as diagnostic state

api_changes.signature: page.info / page.click_xy / page.type_text / page.scroll capability operations
LoopEngine.checkTerminalCondition no longer returns progress_uncertain for no-progress diagnostics

security_implications: Dogfood runner reports redact provider credentials and only records provider/model/baseUrl/api metadata.

Existing-Chrome bridge is documented as not reading cookies, localStorage, profile secrets or passwords; it maps product-issued page/tabs requests to the claimed tab and stores evidence under .ml-cache/dogfood.
Debug evidence keys are stripped from normal LLM context and chat tool event projections, while remaining available through explicit observability/artifact paths.
migration_notes: Existing docs/tests that treat page.query or UID-only page.click/fill as the browser automation mainline should be considered legacy pressure and reviewed against Browser Harness principles.
Full CDP/page.cdp/page.js/page.wait product bindings are not completed in this seal; this work establishes the dogfood/debug substrate and documents the remaining alignment path.
